search.query: | inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinstances | dedup account_name | table account_name

input.choice: Exclude servers not associated to Server Profiles

search.query:
| makeresults
| eval earliest_val = if(isnull("$createtime.earliest$") OR "$createtime.earliest$"="0", "-9999d", "$createtime.earliest$") | eval latest_val = if(isnull("$createtime.latest$") OR "$createtime.latest$"="now" OR "$createtime.latest$" = "", "-0m", "$createtime.latest$")
| eval earliest = relative_time(now(), earliest_val) | eval latest = relative_time(now(), latest_val) | table earliest, latest

single.title: Displays all active advisory instances currently applicable to managed devices within the selected account and time range.

search.query:
| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinstances | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | eval CreateTime=strptime(CreateTime,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%NZ") | where CreateTime >= $timeRange.earliest$ AND CreateTime <= $timeRange.latest$
| search account_name IN ($account_name$) | rename "Advisory.Moid" as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid | eval affected_moid='AffectedObject.Moid' | join type=left affected_moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_compute_physicalsummaries | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | eval affected_moid=Moid | join type=left affected_moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_server_profiles | eval affected_moid='AssignedServer.Moid' | rename Name as ProfileName, Moid as ProfileMoid ] | eval HasProfile=if(ProfileMoid!="","true","false") | table HasProfile,affected_moid ]
| where "$servers_with_profiles$"="false" OR HasProfile="$servers_with_profiles$"
| join type=left AdvisoryDefinitionMoid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisorydefinitions | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Moid as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid, Name as AdvisoryDefinitionName, Description as AdvisoryDefinitionDescription, Type as AdvisoryDefinitionType, ExternalUrl as AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl, DatePublished as AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished | fields AdvisoryDefinitionMoid AdvisoryDefinitionName AdvisoryDefinitionDescription AdvisoryDefinitionType AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished ] | join type=left AdvisoryDefinitionMoid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_securityadvisories | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Moid as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid, Name as AdvisoryDefinitionName, Description as AdvisoryDefinitionDescription, ObjectType as AdvisoryDefinitionType, ExternalUrl as AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl, DatePublished as AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished | fields AdvisoryDefinitionMoid AdvisoryDefinitionName AdvisoryDefinitionDescription AdvisoryDefinitionType AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished ] | join type=left AdvisoryDefinitionMoid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinfos | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename "Advisory.Moid" as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid, Moid as AdvisoryInfosMoid, State as AdvisoryInfosState, Impact as AdvisoryInfosImpact | fields AdvisoryDefinitionMoid AdvisoryInfosMoid AdvisoryInfosState AdvisoryInfosImpact ] | eval PublishedDate=strptime(AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%NZ") | eval AdvisoryInfosState = coalesce(AdvisoryInfosState, State) | where AdvisoryInfosState="active" or AdvisoryInfosState="unknown" | stats count AS "Active Advisories"

single.title: Displays all acknowledged advisory instances within the selected account and time range.

search.query:
| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinstances | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | search account_name IN ($account_name$) | rename "Advisory.Moid" as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid | eval CreateTime=strptime(CreateTime,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%NZ") | where CreateTime >= $timeRange.earliest$ AND CreateTime <= $timeRange.latest$
| eval affected_moid='AffectedObject.Moid' | join type=left affected_moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_compute_physicalsummaries | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | eval affected_moid=Moid | join type=left affected_moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_server_profiles | eval affected_moid='AssignedServer.Moid' | rename Name as ProfileName, Moid as ProfileMoid ] | eval HasProfile=if(ProfileMoid!="","true","false") | table HasProfile,affected_moid] | where "$servers_with_profiles$"="false" OR HasProfile="$servers_with_profiles$"
| join type=left AdvisoryDefinitionMoid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisorydefinitions | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Moid as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid, Name as AdvisoryDefinitionName, Description as AdvisoryDefinitionDescription, Type as AdvisoryDefinitionType, ExternalUrl as AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl, DatePublished as AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished | fields AdvisoryDefinitionMoid AdvisoryDefinitionName AdvisoryDefinitionDescription AdvisoryDefinitionType AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished ] | join type=left AdvisoryDefinitionMoid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_securityadvisories | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Moid as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid, Name as AdvisoryDefinitionName, Description as AdvisoryDefinitionDescription, ObjectType as AdvisoryDefinitionType, ExternalUrl as AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl, DatePublished as AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished | fields AdvisoryDefinitionMoid AdvisoryDefinitionName AdvisoryDefinitionDescription AdvisoryDefinitionType AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished ] | join type=left AdvisoryDefinitionMoid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinfos | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename "Advisory.Moid" as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid, Moid as AdvisoryInfosMoid, State as AdvisoryInfosState, Impact as AdvisoryInfosImpact | fields AdvisoryDefinitionMoid AdvisoryInfosMoid AdvisoryInfosState AdvisoryInfosImpact ] | eval PublishedDate=strptime(AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%NZ") | where AdvisoryInfosState="acknowledged" | stats count AS "Advisories"

chart.title: Displays the distribution of Cisco Intersight advisory instances categorized by advisory type.

search.query:
| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinstances | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | search account_name IN ($account_name$) | rename "Advisory.Moid" as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid | eval CreateTime=strptime(CreateTime,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%NZ") | where CreateTime >= $timeRange.earliest$ AND CreateTime <= $timeRange.latest$
| eval affected_moid='AffectedObject.Moid' | join type=left affected_moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_compute_physicalsummaries | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | eval affected_moid=Moid | join type=left affected_moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_server_profiles | eval affected_moid='AssignedServer.Moid' | rename Name as ProfileName, Moid as ProfileMoid ] | eval HasProfile=if(ProfileMoid!="","true","false") | table HasProfile,affected_moid] | where "$servers_with_profiles$"="false" OR HasProfile="$servers_with_profiles$"
| join type=left AdvisoryDefinitionMoid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisorydefinitions | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Moid as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid, Name as AdvisoryDefinitionName, Description as AdvisoryDefinitionDescription, Type as AdvisoryDefinitionType, ExternalUrl as AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl, DatePublished as AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished | fields AdvisoryDefinitionMoid AdvisoryDefinitionName AdvisoryDefinitionDescription AdvisoryDefinitionType AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished ] | join type=left AdvisoryDefinitionMoid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_securityadvisories | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Moid as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid, Name as AdvisoryDefinitionName, Description as AdvisoryDefinitionDescription, ObjectType as AdvisoryDefinitionType, ExternalUrl as AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl, DatePublished as AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished | fields AdvisoryDefinitionMoid AdvisoryDefinitionName AdvisoryDefinitionDescription AdvisoryDefinitionType AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished ] | join type=left AdvisoryDefinitionMoid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinfos | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename "Advisory.Moid" as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid, Moid as AdvisoryInfosMoid, State as AdvisoryInfosState, Impact as AdvisoryInfosImpact | fields AdvisoryDefinitionMoid AdvisoryInfosMoid AdvisoryInfosState AdvisoryInfosImpact ] | eval PublishedDate=strptime(AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%NZ") | stats count AS Advisories by AdvisoryDefinitionType | eval "Advisory Type"=AdvisoryDefinitionType | fields "Advisory Type" Advisories
| stats sum(Advisories) AS Advisories by "Advisory Type"
| eval "Advisory Type"=case( 'Advisory Type'="tam.SecurityAdvisory","Security Advisory", 'Advisory Type'="eolAdvisory","End-of-Life Advisory", 'Advisory Type'="fieldNotice","Field Notice", 1=1,'Advisory Type' )

chart.title: Shows advisory instances grouped by platform or target type (for example, IMM, Standalone, Unified Edge and others).

search.query:
| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinstances | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | search account_name IN ($account_name$) | rename "Advisory.Moid" as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid | eval CreateTime=strptime(CreateTime,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%NZ") | where CreateTime >= $timeRange.earliest$ AND CreateTime <= $timeRange.latest$
| eval owners_expand='Owners.Owners' | mvexpand owners_expand | where owners_expand != AccountMoid | join type=left owners_expand [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_asset_targets | rename RegisteredDevice.Moid as owners_expand, Moid as TargetMoid | table TargetType, TargetMoid, owners_expand ] | where isnotnull(TargetType) | dedup Moid
| eval affected_moid='AffectedObject.Moid' | join type=left affected_moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_compute_physicalsummaries | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | eval affected_moid=Moid | join type=left affected_moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_server_profiles | eval affected_moid='AssignedServer.Moid' | rename Name as ProfileName, Moid as ProfileMoid ] | eval HasProfile=if(ProfileMoid!="","true","false") | table HasProfile,affected_moid] | where "$servers_with_profiles$"="false" OR HasProfile="$servers_with_profiles$"
| join type=left AdvisoryDefinitionMoid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisorydefinitions | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Moid as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid, Name as AdvisoryDefinitionName, Description as AdvisoryDefinitionDescription, Type as AdvisoryDefinitionType, ExternalUrl as AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl, DatePublished as AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished | fields AdvisoryDefinitionMoid AdvisoryDefinitionName AdvisoryDefinitionDescription AdvisoryDefinitionType AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished ] | join type=left AdvisoryDefinitionMoid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_securityadvisories | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Moid as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid, Name as AdvisoryDefinitionName, Description as AdvisoryDefinitionDescription, ObjectType as AdvisoryDefinitionType, ExternalUrl as AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl, DatePublished as AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished | fields AdvisoryDefinitionMoid AdvisoryDefinitionName AdvisoryDefinitionDescription AdvisoryDefinitionType AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished ] | join type=left AdvisoryDefinitionMoid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinfos | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename "Advisory.Moid" as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid, Moid as AdvisoryInfosMoid, State as AdvisoryInfosState, Impact as AdvisoryInfosImpact | fields AdvisoryDefinitionMoid AdvisoryInfosMoid AdvisoryInfosState AdvisoryInfosImpact ] | eval PublishedDate=strptime(AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%NZ")
| eval "Target Type"=case(TargetType="UCSFIISM", "IMM", TargetType="UCSXECMC", "Unified Edge", true(), "Standalone") | stats count by "Target Type"

chart.title: Groups Cisco Intersight advisory instances by the type of affected object.

search.query:
| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinstances | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | search account_name IN ($account_name$) | rename "Advisory.Moid" as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid | eval CreateTime=strptime(CreateTime,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%NZ") | where CreateTime >= $timeRange.earliest$ AND CreateTime <= $timeRange.latest$
| eval affected_moid='AffectedObject.Moid' | join type=left affected_moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_compute_physicalsummaries | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | eval affected_moid=Moid | join type=left affected_moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_server_profiles | eval affected_moid='AssignedServer.Moid' | rename Name as ProfileName, Moid as ProfileMoid ] | eval HasProfile=if(ProfileMoid!="","true","false") | table HasProfile,affected_moid] | where "$servers_with_profiles$"="false" OR HasProfile="$servers_with_profiles$"
| join type=left AdvisoryDefinitionMoid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisorydefinitions | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Moid as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid, Name as AdvisoryDefinitionName, Description as AdvisoryDefinitionDescription, Type as AdvisoryDefinitionType, ExternalUrl as AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl, DatePublished as AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished | fields AdvisoryDefinitionMoid AdvisoryDefinitionName AdvisoryDefinitionDescription AdvisoryDefinitionType AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished ] | join type=left AdvisoryDefinitionMoid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_securityadvisories | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Moid as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid, Name as AdvisoryDefinitionName, Description as AdvisoryDefinitionDescription, ObjectType as AdvisoryDefinitionType, ExternalUrl as AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl, DatePublished as AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished | fields AdvisoryDefinitionMoid AdvisoryDefinitionName AdvisoryDefinitionDescription AdvisoryDefinitionType AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished ] | join type=left AdvisoryDefinitionMoid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinfos | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename "Advisory.Moid" as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid, Moid as AdvisoryInfosMoid, State as AdvisoryInfosState, Impact as AdvisoryInfosImpact | fields AdvisoryDefinitionMoid AdvisoryInfosMoid AdvisoryInfosState AdvisoryInfosImpact ] | eval PublishedDate=strptime(AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%NZ")
| eval "Object Type"=case( 'AffectedObject.ObjectType'="compute.Blade","Blade Server", 'AffectedObject.ObjectType'="compute.RackUnit","Rack Server", 'AffectedObject.ObjectType'="equipment.Chassis","Chassis", 'AffectedObject.ObjectType'="equipment.Fex","Equipment Fex", 'AffectedObject.ObjectType'="hyperflex.Cluster","Hyperflex Cluster", 'AffectedObject.ObjectType'="iaas.UcsdInfo","Iaas UcsdInfo", 'AffectedObject.ObjectType'="network.Element","FI", 1=1,"Other" )
| stats count AS "Total Count" by "Object Type"

| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinstances | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | search account_name IN ($account_name$) | rename "Advisory.Moid" as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid
| join type=left AdvisoryDefinitionMoid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisorydefinitions | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Moid as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid, Name as AdvisoryDefinitionName, Description as AdvisoryDefinitionDescription, Type as AdvisoryDefinitionType, ExternalUrl as AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl, DatePublished as AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished | fields AdvisoryDefinitionMoid AdvisoryDefinitionName AdvisoryDefinitionDescription AdvisoryDefinitionType AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished ] | join type=left AdvisoryDefinitionMoid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_securityadvisories | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Moid as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid, Name as AdvisoryDefinitionName, Description as AdvisoryDefinitionDescription, ObjectType as AdvisoryDefinitionType, ExternalUrl as AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl, DatePublished as AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished | fields AdvisoryDefinitionMoid AdvisoryDefinitionName AdvisoryDefinitionDescription AdvisoryDefinitionType AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished ]
| rename AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished as DatePublished | rename DatePublished as PublishedDate
| dedup AdvisoryDefinitionType | eval "AdvisoryDefinitionType"=case( 'AdvisoryDefinitionType'="tam.SecurityAdvisory","Security Advisory", 'AdvisoryDefinitionType'="eolAdvisory","End-of-Life Advisory", 'AdvisoryDefinitionType'="fieldNotice","Field Notice", 1=1,'AdvisoryDefinitionType' ) | table "AdvisoryDefinitionType"

| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinstances | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | search account_name IN ($account_name$) | rename "Advisory.Moid" as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid | dedup AffectedObjectType | eval "AffectedObjectType"=case( 'AffectedObjectType'="compute.Blade","Blade Server", 'AffectedObjectType'="compute.RackUnit","Rack Server", 'AffectedObjectType'="equipment.Chassis","Chassis", 'AffectedObjectType'="network.Element","FI" ) | where isnotnull('AffectedObjectType') | table AffectedObjectType

table.title: Displays detailed information about each Cisco Intersight advisory instance, publication date, and Cisco documentation link(click on Name).

search.query:
| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinstances | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | search account_name IN ($account_name$) | rename "Advisory.Moid" as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid | eval CreateTime=strptime(CreateTime,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%NZ") | where CreateTime >= $timeRange.earliest$ AND CreateTime <= $timeRange.latest$ | eval owners_expand='Owners.Owners' | mvexpand owners_expand | where owners_expand != AccountMoid | join type=left owners_expand [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_asset_targets | rename RegisteredDevice.Moid as owners_expand, Moid as TargetMoid | table TargetType, TargetMoid, owners_expand ] | where isnotnull(TargetType) | dedup Moid | eval affected_moid='AffectedObject.Moid' | join type=left affected_moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_compute_physicalsummaries | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | eval affected_moid=Moid | join type=left affected_moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_server_profiles | eval affected_moid='AssignedServer.Moid' | rename Name as ProfileName, Moid as ProfileMoid ] | eval HasProfile=if(ProfileMoid!="","true","false") | table HasProfile,affected_moid] | where "$servers_with_profiles$"="false" OR HasProfile="$servers_with_profiles$"
| join type=left AdvisoryDefinitionMoid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisorydefinitions | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Moid as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid, Name as AdvisoryDefinitionName, Description as AdvisoryDefinitionDescription, Type as AdvisoryDefinitionType, ExternalUrl as AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl, DatePublished as AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished | fields AdvisoryDefinitionMoid AdvisoryDefinitionName AdvisoryDefinitionDescription AdvisoryDefinitionType AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished ] | join type=left AdvisoryDefinitionMoid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_securityadvisories | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename Moid as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid, Name as AdvisoryDefinitionName, Description as AdvisoryDefinitionDescription, ObjectType as AdvisoryDefinitionType, ExternalUrl as AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl, DatePublished as AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished, CveIds.CveIds as SecurityAdvisoryCVEs | fields AdvisoryDefinitionMoid AdvisoryDefinitionName AdvisoryDefinitionDescription AdvisoryDefinitionType AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished SecurityAdvisoryCVEs ] | join type=left AdvisoryDefinitionMoid [| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinfos | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | rename "Advisory.Moid" as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid, Moid as AdvisoryInfosMoid, State as AdvisoryInfosState, Impact as AdvisoryInfosImpact | fields AdvisoryDefinitionMoid AdvisoryInfosMoid AdvisoryInfosState AdvisoryInfosImpact ] | rename AdvisoryDefinitionDatePublished as DatePublished | rename DatePublished as PublishedDate
| rename AffectedObject.PlatformType AS "Platform Type", AdvisoryDefinitionType AS "Advisory Type", AffectedObject.ObjectType AS "Object Type" | eval "Target Type"=case(TargetType="UCSFIISM", "IMM", TargetType="UCSXECMC", "Unified Edge", true(), "Standalone") | eval "Advisory Type"=case( 'Advisory Type'="tam.SecurityAdvisory","Security Advisory", 'Advisory Type'="eolAdvisory","End-of-Life Advisory", 'Advisory Type'="fieldNotice","Field Notice", 1=1,'Advisory Type' ) | eval "Object Type"=case( 'Object Type'="compute.Blade","Blade Server", 'Object Type'="compute.RackUnit","Rack Server", 'Object Type'="equipment.Chassis","Chassis", 'Object Type'="network.Element","FI" ) | where isnotnull('Object Type') | eval AdvisoryInfosState = coalesce(AdvisoryInfosState, State)
| eval keep = case( "$AdvisoryInfosState$"="active" AND ('AdvisoryInfosState' = "$AdvisoryInfosState$" or 'AdvisoryInfosState' = "unknown"), 1, "$AdvisoryInfosState$"="acknowledged" AND 'AdvisoryInfosState' = "$AdvisoryInfosState$", 1, "$AdvisoryDefinitionType$"!="None" AND "$AdvisoryDefinitionType$" = 'Advisory Type', 1, "$AdvisoryTargetType$"!="None" AND 'Target Type' = "$AdvisoryTargetType$", 1, "$AdvisoryAffectedObjectType$"!="None" AND 'Object Type' = "$AdvisoryAffectedObjectType$", 1, true(), 0 ) | where keep=1 OR ( "$AdvisoryInfosState$" = "None" AND "$AdvisoryDefinitionType$" = "None" AND "$AdvisoryTargetType$" = "None" AND "$AdvisoryAffectedObjectType$" = "None" )
| eval SourceType="AdvisoryInstance" | rename AdvisoryInfosImpact AS Impact AdvisoryInfosState AS State AdvisoryDefinitionName AS "Name" AdvisoryDefinitionExternalUrl AS "Cisco Doc" PublishedDate AS "Published Date"
| eval Name=Name+"_-_"+'Cisco Doc' | rename Moid as _moid
| where isnull("$advisory_name$") OR "$advisory_name$"="" OR like(lower(Name), "%" . lower("$advisory_name$") . "%") | where ("$advisory_type$"="*" OR 'Advisory Type'="$advisory_type$") | where ("$object_type$"="*" OR 'Object Type'="$object_type$")
| stats values(Name) AS Name values(State) AS State values("Advisory Type") AS "Advisory Type" values("Published Date") AS "Published Date" values("Target Type") AS "Target Type" count AS "Affected Objects" values(SecurityAdvisoryCVEs) AS SecurityAdvisoryCVEs by AdvisoryDefinitionMoid "Object Type"
| eval combo = 'Object Type' . "(" . 'Affected Objects' . ") , "
| stats values(Name) AS Name values(State) AS State values("Advisory Type") AS "Advisory Type" values(combo) AS "Affected Object Type" values(SecurityAdvisoryCVEs) AS "Referenced Vulnerabilities" values("Target Type") AS "Target Type" values("Published Date") AS "Published Date" by AdvisoryDefinitionMoid
| makemv delim=" , " "Affected Object Type" | makemv delim=" , " "Target Type"
| sort "Advisory Type" desc | rename AdvisoryDefinitionMoid as _AdvisoryDefinitionMoid

table.title: Displays the list of devices affected by each Cisco Intersight advisory instance, including their platform type, object type, and associated profile details.

search.query:
| inputlookup cisco_intersight_tam_advisoryinstances | where splunk_managed_lifecycle == "PRESENT" | eval CreateTime=strptime(CreateTime,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%NZ") | where CreateTime >= $timeRange.earliest$ AND CreateTime <= $timeRange.latest$ | rename "Advisory.Moid" as AdvisoryDefinitionMoid | search account_name IN ($account_name$) | search AdvisoryDefinitionMoid="$advisory_moid$" | eval SourceType="AdvisoryInstance" | eval affected_moid='AffectedObject.Moid' | eval object_type='AffectedObject.ObjectType' | fields affected_moid object_type SourceType
| join type=left affected_moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_compute_physicalsummaries | eval ServerMoid=Moid | join type=left ServerMoid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_server_profiles | eval ServerMoid='AssignedServer.Moid' | rename Name as ProfileName, Moid as ProfileMoid | table ProfileName, ProfileMoid, ServerMoid ] | eval HasProfile=if(ProfileMoid!="","true","false") | where ( "$servers_with_profiles$"="false" or HasProfile="$servers_with_profiles$" ) | rename Moid as affected_moid Name as ObjectName Model as ObjectModel RegisteredDevice.DeviceHostname as DomainName | table affected_moid, ObjectName, ObjectModel, Dn, DomainName ] | join type=left affected_moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_equipment_chasses | rename Moid as affected_moid Name as ObjectName Model as ObjectModel | table affected_moid, ObjectName, ObjectModel, Dn ] | join type=left affected_moid [ | inputlookup cisco_intersight_network_elements | rename Moid as affected_moid Name as ObjectName Model as ObjectModel | table affected_moid, ObjectName, ObjectModel, Dn ]
| eval "Object Type"=case( 'object_type'="compute.Blade","Blade Server", 'object_type'="compute.RackUnit","Rack Server", 'object_type'="equipment.Chassis","Chassis", 'object_type'="network.Element","FI" ) | where isnotnull('Object Type')
| where isnotnull(ObjectName) | rename ObjectName as "Affected Object Name", ObjectModel as "Affected Object Model", SourceType as "Source Type", DomainName as "Domain Name" | table "Domain Name", "Affected Object Name", "Object Type", "Affected Object Model", Dn
